song_name: When Im Back On My Feet Again
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse]

[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]
Gonna break these chains around me[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]
Gonna learn to fly again[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]
May be hard, may be hard[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]
But I'll do it[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F[/ch]
When I'm back on my feet again[/tab]

[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
Soon these tears will all be dryin'[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
Soon these eyes will see the sun[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]
Might take time, might take time[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]
But I'll see it[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
When I'm back on my feet again[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]                    [ch]F[/ch]
When I'm back on my feet again[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Eb[/ch]
I'll walk proud down this street again[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Bb[/ch]
And they'll all look at me again[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]C[/ch]
And they'll see that I'm strong[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]
Gonna hear the children laughing[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]
Gonna hear the voices sing[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]
Won't be long, won't be long[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bb[/ch]
Till I hear them[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]
When I'm back on my feet again[/tab]

[tab]       [ch]F[/ch]
Gonna feel the sweet light of heaven[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]
Shining down it's light on me[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]
One sweet day, one sweet day[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bb[/ch]
I will feel it[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F[/ch]
When I'm back on my feet again[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]                     [ch]F[/ch]
When I'm back on my feet again[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Eb[/ch]
I'll walk proud down this street again[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Bb[/ch]
And they'll all look at me again[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]C[/ch]
And they'll see that I'm strong[/tab]

[tab]                   [ch]F[/ch]
And I'm not gonna crawl again[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]Eb[/ch]
I will learn to stand tall again[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Bb[/ch]
No I'm not gonna fall again[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]C[/ch]
Cos I'll learn to be strong[/tab]


[Outro] 

[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
Soon these tears will all be dryin'[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]
Soon these eyes will see the sun[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
Won't be long, won't be long[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
Till I see it[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
When I'm back on my feet again[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
When I'm back on my feet again[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]G[/ch]
I'll be back on my feet again...[/tab]
